title: TNT Hollywood sound
description: Replaces the sounds for explosions for a Hollywood style explosion SFX.
body:
Replaces the SFX for explosions for Hollywood style explosions.

Install file into the resourcepacks folder. Unzipping is not needed but works as well.

Tested on 1.21.11 in Legacy Launcher but will probably work on others because these are standard sound files.
You may need to change the version number in the pack.mcmeta file and change the directory structure according to your version of Minecraft.
